name: claude-edit-gutter
description: Shows Claude Code edits inside the open editor: quick-diff gutter marks (with inline peek) for non-git files, and a brief line highlight on just-edited lines. Installs its own Claude Code PostToolUse hook and settings.json wiring on first run -- no manual setup needed.

commands.title: Claude Edit Gutter: Approve All Claude Edits
Claude Edit Gutter: Review Pending Edits
